What We Clean

Specialized Commercial Cleaning for Every Space

Tailored cleaning programs for offices, healthcare, retail, industrial, and more — with eco-friendly products and consistent professional results.

Commercial Office Cleaning

Daily, weekly, or monthly office cleaning tailored to your operations. Keep your team productive and clients impressed.

Medical Office Cleaning

Healthcare-grade sanitization following strict infection control protocols. Safe for patients, staff, and compliant with health regulations.

Post-Construction Cleaning

Complete dust, debris, and residue removal after construction. We leave your space spotless and move-in ready.

Building & Common Areas

Lobbies, hallways, elevators, and shared spaces — clean, welcoming, and well-maintained for tenants and visitors.

Retail Cleaning

Warehouse Cleaning

Large-scale industrial cleaning to maintain a safe, organized, dust-free warehouse environment compliant with H&S regulations.

Who We Are

Built on Trust. Delivered with Excellence.

We are a GTA-based commercial cleaning company committed to raising industry standards. Skilled professionals, advanced techniques, and genuine attention to detail — leaving a lasting impression with every space we clean.

  • Impeccable results and consistent attention to detail on every visit
  • Outstanding customer service from first contact to completion

Large-Scale Contracts

Trusted by Large Organizations & Public Institutions

Shining Legacy serves large corporations, government agencies, healthcare networks, educational institutions, and public-sector organizations that demand the highest standards of cleanliness, compliance, and discretion.

We understand the procurement requirements, access protocols, and performance standards that large organizations expect — and we consistently deliver.

  • Government buildings, municipal facilities, and public offices
  • Hospital networks, long-term care facilities, and healthcare campuses
  • Corporate head offices, multi-tenant towers, and commercial campuses
  • Educational institutions, community centres, and public spaces
  • Transparent pricing, dedicated account managers, and compliance reporting

Frequently Asked Questions

Commercial Cleaning Questions

How much does commercial cleaning cost in the GTA?
Commercial cleaning costs in the GTA vary based on space size, frequency, and facility type. Most office cleaning contracts range from $300 to $1,500 per month. Get your free custom quote within 24 hours.
Do you offer medical office cleaning in Durham Region?
Yes. We provide specialized medical office cleaning throughout Durham Region, Clarington, and the Greater Toronto Area, following strict infection control and healthcare cleaning protocols.
How quickly can you start commercial cleaning service?
We typically begin new commercial cleaning contracts within 3-5 business days of signing. We respond to all quote requests within 24 hours.
Are your cleaning products eco-friendly?
Yes. All of our cleaning products are eco-friendly, WHMIS-compliant, and non-toxic, making them safe for your employees, clients, and the environment.
Do you clean warehouses in Clarington and Durham?
Yes. We offer professional warehouse and industrial cleaning services throughout Clarington, Durham Region, and the GTA, compliant with occupational health and safety regulations.
